Let's re-examine the image.
The "Profile" link is centered horizontally.
The whole container is centered at x=500.
The blue box is centered at x=500.

The "Profile" row is the top row in the blue box.

Middle of "Profile" row is (463 + 530) / 2 = 496.5.
So (500, 496) seems like a good bet.
